title: CHEMISTRY OF THE RARE-EARTHS. PART II. MACRO- AND MICRO-ESTIMATION OF CAESIUM IN PRESENCE OF  POTASSIUM AND RUBIDIUM WITH THE HELP OF RARE-EARTHS
author: NIHAR KUMAR DUTT
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: An improved method for the quantitative determination of caesium and its separation from rubidium and potassium has been described. Cs has been precipitated as Cs 2 NaL(NO 2 ) 6  and weighed directly in a gooch crucible. Cs has also been determined volumetrically by estimating the nitrite content of the compound with cede sulphate. Both gravimetric and volumetric processes have been successfully adopted for micro-determination of caesium.
